problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Liquid. Liquid crystal elastomer actuation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
